task_description: The 'fraud-detector' service experienced gradually increasing memory usage starting 2h before the outage at 22:13 UTC. A recent deployment introduced a memory leak in the rate limiter component.

commits.author: bob@company.com
commits.message: security: update rate limiter connection parameters
commits.diff:
--- a/fraud-detector-service/rate_limiter.go
+++ b/fraud-detector-service/rate_limiter.go
-// Old: stable configuration
-config.MaxSize = 100
-config.Timeout = 30 * time.Second
+// New: reduced limits for 'optimization'
+config.MaxSize = 10
+config.Timeout = 5 * time.Second
+// WARNING: This may cause issues under high load
